proved_now: A real 24h soak completed on the MSI soak machine and produced a contiguous 989-cycle evidence set plus passing stress artifacts.
Descriptor reuse remained useful across the 24h run: reuse-backed descriptor-opportunity cases averaged 0.979146 correctness versus 0.375 for the single cold non-reuse opportunity.
Governance remained active and bounded: 165 reuse-assisted high-value alias cases stayed on hold instead of bypassing review, while safe follow-up cases were still accepted.

Memory stayed bounded and disciplined in the observed 24h run: runtime memory stayed at 1507328 bytes, warm memory peaked at 5868/8192 bytes, raw logs were never promoted, and duplicate reuse/compression accumulated.
Unresolved pressure did not accumulate across the long-run cycle lane: only the bootstrap cycle had unresolved pressure and recurring unresolved count stayed at zero throughout.
The repeated-cycle fabric remained meaningful rather than merely alive because reviewed memory and governance kept changing case outcomes, not just preserving process uptime.
still_open: At the time of this 24h analysis, Phase 8 was still open because the real 72h soak was still running or pending final extraction.
This 24h evidence does not prove MacBook Air-only long-run endurance because the imported long-run artifacts came from the MSI soak machine.
This 24h evidence does not prove multi-day drift behavior beyond about one day.
Resume continuity is only proven here for one recovered checkpoint-boundary interruption, not for full OS restart or lid-close recovery.
Lifecycle elasticity in the repeated-cycle lane should not be overstated: long-run cycles stayed structurally stable, while split/merge proof still comes from the stress lanes.
later_closure_note: Later update on 2026-03-18: the real 72h soak completed on the MSI soak machine.
Later update on 2026-03-18: Phase 8 closed honestly and AGIF_FABRIC_P8_PASS was earned.
Later update on 2026-03-18: recorded project progress moved to 570/600.

watch during 72h soak: verify that the single recovered manifest-write interruption remains an isolated file-system event and does not repeat under longer runtime.
watch during 72h soak: keep confirming that unresolved pressure stays near zero and does not begin to recur after the 24h mark.
watch during 72h soak: confirm the governed high-value alias hold remains correct without governance becoming more conservative on safe reuse-backed followups.
